query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "agenticsts: a bounded-memory testbed for long-horizon llm agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by measuring the same core mechanism (long-horizon reasoning capabilities) and dependent variable (performance on extended reasoning tasks) as the user's question regarding "Long-Horizon LLM Agents," even though it focuses on Chain-of-Thought reasoning rather than the specific "Bounded-Memory" testbed architecture. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and canonical benchmark for the "long-horizon" aspect of the user's proposed research extension.
